data.content: Implementation review approved. All 6 acceptance criteria verified: (1) Light Theme toggle in live terminal header via TerminalToolbar, (2) Light Theme toggle in History Debugger header via DebugPanelHeader, (3) Light Theme setting in Settings defaults section, (4) all three controls share state through useTerminalThemePreference React Query hook with optimistic updates — toggling any one updates the others immediately, (5) terminalLightTheme persisted to server-side TOML settings store via /api/settings PATCH with schema/merge/backfill all updated, (6) theme restored on startup from fetched settings. Quality gates: lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 208 test files / 2379 tests passing, build OK. Minor note: xterm applies theme at creation time; mid-session toggles repaint chrome but not existing terminal text.
